type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The increase in VOC (Other Non-Point) was due to a methodology change by the provincial regulator (Alberta Energy Regulator), specifically Directive 60. Accordingly, engineering calculations were applied to vented emissions as per the directive in 2019. In 2020, these streams were measured and will consequently be lower.
All ethylene glycol is accounted for in mechanical carry-over losses. None is released.
